12 May&#xA0;2026 

&#xA0; 

HSBC HOLDINGS PLC 

ISSUANCE OF SENIOR UNSECURED NOTES 

AND ADMISSION TO TRADING 

&#xA0; &#xA0; 

On&#xA0;12 May&#xA0;2026, HSBC Holdings plc issued
EUR1,250,000,000&#xA0;4.086% Fixed to Floating Rate Notes
due&#xA0;2036 (ISIN: XS3367697797), EUR1,250,000,000&#xA0;3.553%
Fixed to Floating Rate Notes due&#xA0;2031 (ISIN: XS3367696047) and
EUR1,000,000,000&#xA0;Floating Rate Notes
due&#xA0;2029&#xA0;(ISIN:&#xA0;XS3367695668) (together, the
' Notes ') under its Debt Issuance Programme&#xA0;(the
' Programme '). 

&#xA0; 

In accordance with PRM 1.5.2R and PRM 1.5.3R of the Financial
Conduct Authority's (' FCA ') Handbook Prospectus Rules: Admission to Trading
on a Regulated Market sourcebook, HSBC Holdings plc notifies the
market that the Notes have been listed on the Official List of the
FCA and admitted to trading on the Main Market of the London Stock
Exchange plc as follows: 

&#xA0; 

Issuer name: 

 &#xA0; 

HSBC Holdings plc 

 &#xA0; 

Issuer LEI: 

 &#xA0; 

MLU0ZO3ML4LN2LL2TL39 

 &#xA0; 

Regulated market on which the securities have been admitted to
trading: 

 &#xA0; 

Main Market of the London Stock Exchange plc 

 &#xA0; 

 &#xA0; 

Name, type and ISIN of the securities and number of securities
admitted to trading: 

 &#xA0; 

EUR1,250,000,000&#xA0;4.086% Fixed to Floating Rate Notes
due&#xA0;2036 (ISIN: XS3367697797) 

&#xA0; 

EUR1,250,000,000&#xA0;3.553% Fixed to Floating Rate Notes
due&#xA0;2031 (ISIN: XS3367696047) 

&#xA0; 

EUR1,000,000,000&#xA0;Floating Rate Notes
due&#xA0;2029&#xA0;(ISIN:&#xA0;XS3367695668) 

 &#xA0; 

Date of admission to trading: 

 &#xA0; 

12 May 2026 

 &#xA0; 

Date of prospectus relating to the securities: 

 &#xA0; 

 &#xA0; 

The base prospectus relating to the Programme dated 30 March 2026,
as supplemented by the supplement thereto dated 5 May
2026,&#xA0;under which the Notes have been issued,
are&#xA0;available for viewing at&#xA0; www.hsbc.com &#xA0;(follow links to
'Investors', 'Fixed income investors' and 'Issuance Programmes'). A
separate final terms dated 8 May 2026 in respect of each series of
Notes is available for viewing at&#xA0; www.hsbc.com &#xA0;(follow links to
'Investors', 'Fixed income investors' and 'Final terms and
supplements'). 

 &#xA0; 

&#xA0; &#xA0; 

Investor enquiries to: 

Greg Case 

+44 (0) 20 7992 3825 

investorrelations@hsbc.com 

 &#xA0; 

Media enquiries to: 

Press Office 

+44 (0) 20 7991 8096 

pressoffice@hsbc.com 

&#xA0; 

Note to editors: 

 &#xA0; 

HSBC Holdings plc 

HSBC Holdings plc, the parent company of HSBC, is headquartered in
London. HSBC serves customers worldwide from offices in
56&#xA0;countries and territories. With assets of US$3,306bn at
31&#xA0;March&#xA0;2026, HSBC is one of the world's largest banking
and financial services organisations. 

&#xA0; 

DISCLAIMER - INTENDED ADDRESSEES 

 &#xA0; 

The Notes have not been and will not be registered under the United
States Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the ' Securities
Act '), or any state securities
laws and, unless so registered, may not be offered or sold within
the United States or to, or for the account or the benefit of, US
persons, as defined in Regulation S under the Securities Act,
except pursuant to an exemption from or in a transaction not
subject to the registration requirements of the Securities Act and
in compliance with any applicable state securities
laws. 

 &#xA0; &#xA0; 

ends/all

by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.
